title: Fazbear Franchise Package - FNAF
description: A FNAF mod focused on tycoon gameplay and the technical elements of FNAF, bringing a unique twist to FNAF mods
body:
[![Veil](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@main/icons/requires_veil.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/veil/version/2.0.0) [![Refraction](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@aa40fd16fbdddff65d6a99787b54a49ab63856b1/icons/requires_refraction.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/refraction/version/1.3.0) ![Won't support Bedrock](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/gh/cast-iron-skillet2/Shithead@aa40fd16fbdddff65d6a99787b54a49ab63856b1/icons/wont_support_bedrock.svg)
# Information **Fazbear Franchise Package** is a vanilla styled FNAF mod focused on the technical and tycoon aspects of FNAF, introducing features such as animatronic assembly, animatronic maintenance, and various other technical elements that make the mod stand out from others. Earning money is as easy as doing some of the mods achievements, to get started all you need to do is to craft the Catalog. The mod is currently in beta and heavily unfinished, be warned that some features (abliet very rarely) will be added or removed if reworked. Each update focuses on revamping a different aspect of the mod, slowly building up to the tycoon update, we promise each update will bring high quality content and better the mod in many ways!
# Add-on Support **Fazbear Franchise Package** has built-in features that allow developers to create their own add-ons for the mod, and all of these built-in features are documented in the [Add-on Wiki](https://github.com/cast-iron-skillet2/ffpackage-addon-template-1.21.1/wiki)! This add-on support includes adding custom animatronic suits, adding shops and tabs to the catalog, and in the next update, support for adding your very own Endoskeleton! Add-on support will be changed and updated over time as the mod grows, giving add-on creators more to work with and more to do, if you'd like feedback or help, check out the extension chat in our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/VE9vHQN3u8)!
# Credits This experience wasn't just made by a single developer! So here's the list of amazing people who have helped out with this project come to life! If you enjoy the mod, then make sure to give them a thanks! :) | Developer | Contribution(s) | |---------------------|:---------------------:| | Skillet🍳 | Project Lead | | Stxngxe | Lead Artist | | Mshrum | Texture Artist | | Zeus | Coding Assistance | | AgPixie | Builder/Tester | | Sir.Pancakes | Sound Effects | | The_Mims_II | Texture Artist/Modeler| | SmollDave | Texture Artist |
